← ringgrid

Performance

Where the milliseconds go, measured per image on public sample boards — not generic aggregates. Single-pass detection runs in three stages: proposal (center detection), fit + decode (ellipse fitting and 16-sector ID decode), and finalize (center correction, hex-neighbor ID consensus, homography, and completion).

Per-image stage breakdown

Per-stage median wall-clock from ringgrid bench, which runs the complete single-pass detector on each public image. Proposal scales with image area; fit + decode scales with marker count; finalize covers the board-level reasoning — homography RANSAC, hex-neighbor ID consensus, and completion of markers missing from the first pass.
proposal (center detection) fit + decode (ellipse fit + ID) finalize (homography, ID consensus, completion)

End-to-end latency — public frames

Framep50 (ms)

Accuracy — synthetic ground truth
